name: @mindos/desktop
description: MindOS Desktop — Human-Agent Collaborative Mind System

scripts.dist:mac-zip:x64: MINDOS_BUNDLE_NODE_PLATFORM=darwin MINDOS_BUNDLE_NODE_ARCH=x64 npm run prepare-mindos-runtime && electron-builder --mac zip --x64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac-zip:arm64: MINDOS_BUNDLE_NODE_PLATFORM=darwin MINDOS_BUNDLE_NODE_ARCH=arm64 npm run prepare-mindos-runtime && electron-builder --mac zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac-zip: npm run build && npm run dist:mac-zip:x64 && npm run dist:mac-zip:arm64
